scripts.worker:dev: npm run build && wrangler dev --env development
scripts.worker:deploy: npm run build && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.worker:check:production: npm run build && wrangler deploy --env production --dry-run
scripts.worker:deploy:development: npm run build && wrangler deploy --env development
scripts.worker:check:development: npm run build && wrangler deploy --env development --dry-run
